detail.description:
Match Go! Heroes is a fast-paced RPG that mixes addictive gem-matching puzzles with exciting turn-based combat. Build a team of unique heroes and unleash powerful match-3 combos to defeat every enemy in your way!

[Effortless Matching, Explosive Battles]
Enjoy the casual match-3 fun and deep tactical strategy. Clear boards with satisfying matches while planning every move like a true tactician. One smart combo can completely swing the fight—and with the right setup, even the fiercest bosses won’
